reasoning: The fetch_ts_fred data shows a substantial drop in the USD/CNY exchange rate over the past year (Yuan strengthening). While a naive linear model from FRED suggested a brief bounce due to a dip at the end of the 30-day window, recent news reports and analyst forecasts (ING, Reuters) from April 2026 indicate a structural breakdown below 6.85, with the PBOC guiding the reference rate down to 6.83 and analysts targeting 6.70 for the year. This strongly suggests the momentum and fundamental trajectory for USD/CNY remains downward (Yuan strengthening further) in the short to medium term. For longer horizons (3-10 years), exchange rate forecasting approaches a near-random walk, so probabilities mean-revert to 0.50. Short-term probabilities are below 0.5 due to the active bearish trend in the currency pair.
